name: Parmesan Cheese Toast Points
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the cheese, parsley, garlic, and mayonnaise together. Mix until incorporated.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Spread 1 tablespoon of the mixture onto each baguette slice.
5. Bake for 6-8 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Ladle the soup into a shallow bowl.
7. Place croutons around the bowl.
8. Garnish with parsley.
